title: gomphia zeylanica
intro: Gomphia zeylanica, also known as Ceylon tea bush or Elephant's head, is a type of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Gomphia zeylanica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Gomphia zeylanica is typically prepared as a decoction or infused as a tea, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
